name: Sabitri Sapkota MPH, PHD
bio: Dr. Sabitri Sapkota is the Executive Director of Possible. She leads the team in designing and implementing healthcare delivery research in Nepal.

name: Mina Shrestha MPhil Pharma, PhD
bio: Dr. Mina Shrestha works as an Associate Scientist, focusing on pharmacology research, healthcare data validation, and clinical trials.

name: Bhubi Bista
bio: Bhubi Bista manages people, organizational culture, team growth, and HR protocols at Possible.

name: Kumar Tamang
bio: Kumar Tamang oversees the operational infrastructure, budget allocations, compliance reporting, and financial resources.

name: Kripa Sigdel
bio: Kripa Sigdel coordinates clinical trials and mental health programs, standardizing collaborative care in primary care health posts.

name: Dikshya Sharma
bio: Dikshya Sharma directs research trials evaluating full-time community health worker programs and maternal care adherence.

name: Jene Shrestha
bio: Jene Shrestha coordinates qualitative assessments and intervention methodologies for intimate partner violence and HIV care.

name: Shuvam Sharma
bio: Shuvam Sharma implements and tracks health post-based clinical trials and behavioral intervention models in rural Nepal.

name: Puskar Paudel
bio: Puskar Paudel manages research trial data collection, CHW workflows, and local government co-design partnerships.

name: Jyoti Nepal
bio: Jyoti Nepal coordinates community research trials, focusing on digital tools and health systems strengthening.

name: Soni Maharjan
bio: Soni Maharjan provides support for administrative systems, accounting services, and daily operations management.

name: Kalpana Ghimire Kadari
bio: Kalpana Ghimire Kadari supports data entry, fieldwork interviews, and implementation studies for mental health models.

name: Saugat Joshi
bio: Saugat Joshi leads qualitative investigations, capturing community narratives and assessing social stigma in clinical trials.

name: Rajesh Kumar Jha
bio: Rajesh Kumar Jha oversees research compliance, clinical training packages, and medication tracking for collaborative care programs.

name: Ramkrishna khatiwada
bio: Ramkrishna Khatiwada manages IT support, server infrastructure, and secure cloud sync functions for the national CHIS platform.

name: Shristi Tiwari
bio: Shristi Tiwari coordinates field assessments and structured interviews evaluating family-based interventions.

name: Alisha Karki
bio: Alisha Karki supports experimental protocol execution, clinic staff coordination, and follow-up metrics reporting.

name: Aastha Kayastha
bio: Aastha Kayastha assists in recruiting, onboarding, and organizing professional development programs.

name: Bhawani Yogi
bio: Bhawani Yogi supports qualitative research tasks, patient surveys, and regional health data compilation.

name: Navin Kumar Sah
bio: Navin Kumar Sah assists in collecting medical registry data and tracking patient follow-up compliance in rural clinics.

name: Renasha Ghimire
bio: Renasha Ghimire monitors digital system integration and collaborates with health post staff to track research metrics.

name: Prakash Pant
bio: Prakash Pant manages the data entry pipelines, performs quality checks, and organizes datasets for statistical studies.

name: Rabina Dhakal
bio: Rabina Dhakal maintains the integrity of scientific records, ensuring clinical trials datasets comply with global standards.

name: Barsha Mainali
bio: Barsha Mainali reviews financial spending plans, grant reports, and manages administrative budgets at Possible.

name: Anant Raut
bio: Anant Raut advises on information architecture, electronic health records, and clinical software systems.

name: Bibhav Acharya, MD
bio: Dr. Bibhav Acharya co-founded Possible and advises on psychiatric treatments, mental health research, and training models.

name: Dan Schwarz, MD, MPH
bio: Dr. Dan Schwarz advises on health systems strengthening, pediatric treatments, and global health research.

name: Rekha Khatri, MSW
bio: Rekha Khatri advises on community outreach programs, social support networks, and gender-based violence projects.

name: David Citrin, MPH, PHD
bio: Dr. David Citrin advises on implementation research designs, anthropological research, and public health policies.

name: Duncan Maru, MD, PhD
bio: Dr. Duncan Maru co-founded Possible and advises on epidemiological research, clinical quality, and community care scaling.

name: Nandini Choudhury
bio: Nandini Choudhury advises on data pipelines, performance metrics analysis, and statistical study design.

name: Pragya Rimal
bio: Pragya Rimal advises on mental health service scaling, therapist supervision methods, and clinical trial coordination.

name: Ryan Schwarz, MD, MBA
bio: Dr. Ryan Schwarz advises on hospital administration, health post infrastructure designs, and budget sustainability.

name: Scott Halliday
bio: Scott Halliday serves as a board advisor, focusing on system infrastructure, logistics support, and governance compliance.

name: Sheela Maru, MD, MPH
role: Advisor, Reproductive, Maternal, Newborn and Child Health
bio: Dr. Sheela Maru advises on maternal healthcare quality indexes, child health programs, and reproductive rights trials.

name: Srijana Shrestha, PhD
bio: Dr. Srijana Shrestha advises on mental health research, behavioral therapies, and training programs for clinicians.

name: Wan-Ju Wu, MD, MPH
role: Advisor, Reproductive Maternal Newborn and Child Health
bio: Dr. Wan-Ju Wu advises on clinical guidelines and evaluation standards for maternal health post services.

name: Samrachana Adhikari, PHD
bio: Dr. Samrachana Adhikari advises on statistical modeling, random assignment controls, and clinical trial outcomes evaluation.
